name: Chocolate Chip Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the sugars in a bowl.
2. Add the margarine, peanut butter, vanilla, and egg to the sugar mixture. Blend until well combined.
3. Gradually add the flour to the mixture, stirring until a soft dough forms.
4. Press the dough into a preheated pizza pan.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes.
6. Sprinkle miniature marshmallows and chocolate chips over the top of the dough.
7. Continue baking for an additional 5-8 minutes, or until the crust is nicely browned and the toppings are melted.
Makes 6 servings.
